llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm available: chatgpt_encouraged. Control arm is the human-only baseline.
llm_extracted.notes: Mean for AI arm calculated as 3.1 + 1.26 = 4.36 from reported effect. Standardized effect explicitly reported as '0.92 SD' which we treat as Cohen's d. P-value reported as inequality 'p < 0.001' so exact value set to null. Regression coefficient confirms the 1.262 point increase with p < 0.001.
source_quotes: AI use increased the average score in the — arguably least complicated — email task by 1.26 points (0.92 SD)

computed.notes: Mean for AI arm calculated as 3.1 + 1.26 = 4.36 from reported effect. Standardized effect explicitly reported as '0.92 SD' which we treat as Cohen's d. P-value reported as inequality 'p < 0.001' so exact value set to null. Regression coefficient confirms the 1.262 point increase with p < 0.001.
